title: helianthemum origanifolium f. majus
intro: Helianthemum origanifolium f. majus, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum origanifolium f. majus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
